response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong technical leadership, architectural skills, and experience with large-scale distributed systems and cloud platforms, they fall significantly short on the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience. Resume shows only ~6 months of documented C++ work at National Instruments plus minor personal projects. The role's focus on a cloud compute platform likely demands deep systems-level and performance-critical C++ expertise that this candidate lacks.
strengths: Proven technical leadership across multiple Staff Engineer roles with mentoring experience, organizing workshops, and establishing coding standards
Strong cloud platform and large-scale distributed systems background including Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/sec, Optilyz infrastructure, and GISCollective Kubernetes platform
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship and testing practices demonstrated across 15+ years of progressive roles with experience in design, architecture, and mentoring
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: resume documents only ~6 months versus the 8-year minimum requirement, failing a non-negotiable baseline qualification
Career trajectory is full-stack and web-focused rather than specialized in systems programming, compute platform architecture, and infrastructure engineering
No demonstrated expertise in hardware architecture, storage systems, compute optimization, or the systems-level performance work central to cloud compute platforms
